role_summary: the corporate tax advisor provides strategic tax advice to optimize tax structures and  ensure compliance.
responsibilities: • advise on corporate tax structuring and planning   • support mergers, acquisitions, and restructuring from a tax perspective   • evaluate tax risks and compliance gaps   • provide opinions on complex tax issues   • coordinate with internal teams and external advisors   • support management in strategic tax decisions   skills & qualif ications:   • ca with strong corporate tax advisory experience   • strategic thinking and risk assessment skills   • strong business understanding
